Question:
Search theoretical physics literature (arXiv, journals) for the 'classicality of single-photon Hawking radiation'. Specifically, identify the three universal dimensionless constants that govern this phenomenon and provide their exact numerical values. Focus on papers discussing photon statistics, squeezing parameters, or the Wigner function in the context of Hawking radiation.
